# SIM Baskı Malzemeleri

> Turkey's leading printing materials supplier since 1983. Manufacturer of EVA COLOR and VECTOR brands, and exclusive Turkish distributor of SAKATA INX (Japan), Zeller+Gmelin (Germany), Hi-Tech Coatings (Netherlands), SCHLENK (Germany), and more. Specializing in offset inks, UV inks, metallic inks, custom color production, printing blankets, and water-based varnishes.

SIM Baskı Malzemeleri (SIM Limited) has been serving the Turkish printing industry for over 40 years from its headquarters in Istanbul. The company operates a 24/7 custom color production laboratory with 15,000 kg monthly capacity, offering L-A-B digital color matching from nature samples, catalogs, or digital values. SIM is both a manufacturer (EVA COLOR inks, VECTOR blankets) and a distributor of world-leading printing supply brands.

Website: https://www.simlimited.net
Languages: Turkish, English, Russian, Arabic
Location: Yakuplu, Beylikdüzü, Istanbul, Turkey
Phone: +90 212 637 62 49
Email: info@simlimited.net

## Products

- [EVA COLOR Fluorescent Inks](https://www.simlimited.net/urunler/eva-color-fluorescent-murekkepler): Vibrant fluorescent ink series for offset printing with eye-catching colors and high performance
- [EVA COLOR Gold Metallic Inks](https://www.simlimited.net/urunler/eva-color-gold-metalik-murekkepler): Gold metallic/gilding ink series in PANTONE 873-876 reference shades for packaging and label printing
- [EVA COLOR Silver Metallic Inks](https://www.simlimited.net/urunler/eva-color-silver-metalik-murekkepler): Silver metallic ink series with superior brilliance and coverage for packaging and luxury print applications
- [SAKATA INX CMYK Inks](https://www.simlimited.net/urunler/sakata-inx-cmyk-murekkepler): Japanese-manufactured CMYK offset inks (distributor since 2002) for brochures, packaging, labels, and promotional prints
- [SAKATA INX PANTONE Inks](https://www.simlimited.net/urunler/sakata-inx-pantone-murekkepler): PANTONE color series meeting international color standards with custom color production capability
- [ZELLER+GMELIN UV Offset Inks](https://www.simlimited.net/urunler/zeller-gmelin-uv-offset-murekkepleri): German-manufactured world-leading UV offset inks with advanced technology solutions
- [SCHLENK Metallic Inks](https://www.simlimited.net/urunler/schlenk-metalik-murekkepler): German-engineered metallic inks with high brilliance, superior coverage, and consistent color quality
- [Custom Colors](https://www.simlimited.net/urunler/ozel-renkler): 24/7 custom color production laboratory for UV and conventional inks with color matching from nature samples, catalogs, or digital LAB values
- [VECTOR Printing Blankets](https://www.simlimited.net/urunler/vector-baski-blanketleri): Offset printing blankets with excellent ink transfer, high dot sharpness, and long-term dimensional stability
- [HI-TECH COATINGS Water-Based Varnish](https://www.simlimited.net/urunler/hi-tech-coatings-dispersiyon-lak): High-quality dispersion varnishes including Soft Touch, Primer, and Barrier coating options

## Company

- [About Us](https://www.simlimited.net/hakkimizda): Company history since 1983, mission, vision, and industry expertise
- [Custom Color Production](https://www.simlimited.net/ozel-renk-uretimi): 24/7 color matching laboratory details, 4-stage production process, and L-A-B digital formulation capabilities
- [Our Brands](https://www.simlimited.net/temsilcilikler): World brand partnerships — SAKATA INX, Zeller+Gmelin, Hi-Tech Coatings, Fujikura, SCHLENK, and more
- [Contact](https://www.simlimited.net/iletisim): Contact information, address, phone, email, and location map

## Resources

- [Printing Materials Guide](https://www.simlimited.net/matbaa-malzemeleri): Comprehensive pillar guide to printing materials — categories, buying criteria, paper-ink compatibility, and supply process
- [Offset Printing Supplies Guide](https://www.simlimited.net/ofset-baski-malzemeleri): In-depth guide to offset inks, blankets, chemicals and varnishes, with conventional vs UV comparison and FAQ
- [Printing Materials in Istanbul](https://www.simlimited.net/matbaa-malzemeleri-istanbul): Local supply page — districts served, same-day delivery, warehouse pickup in Beylikdüzü
- [Printing Glossary](https://www.simlimited.net/matbaa-terimleri-sozlugu): 70+ printing terms explained in four languages
- [FAQ](https://www.simlimited.net/sss): Frequently asked questions about ink types, custom color production, delivery, technical support, and brand partnerships
- [Blog](https://www.simlimited.net/blog): Industry articles on offset ink selection, metallic ink production, and color matching techniques
